highlights.text: Serial code CH-005 | TRAGUIN tour code TRG-SWI-GRD-2026
Country: Switzerland | Category: Premium Grand Switzerland Tour Package
Destinations: Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Jungfraujoch • Zermatt • Montreux • Geneva

itinerary.title: Grand Switzerland Tour
itinerary.tagline: Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Jungfraujoch • Zermatt • Montreux • Geneva
itinerary.overview:
Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Jungfraujoch • Zermatt • Montreux • Geneva 09 Nights / 10 Days Grand Switzerland Premium Expedition SERIAL CODE: CH-005 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SWI-GRD-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Switzerland CATEGORY: Premium Grand Switzerland Tour Package DURATION: 09 Nights / 10 Days Zurich(2N) + Lucerne(2N) + Interlaken(2N) + Zermatt(2N) + Geneva(1N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the absolute best of Switzerland with our TRAGUIN curated Grand Expedition. This comprehensive 10-day journey covers all iconic destinations—from the sophistication of Zurich and Lucerne to the alpine heart of Interlaken, the grandeur of Zermatt, and the lakeside elegance of Geneva—ensuring unforgettable memories in ultimate comfort. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 09 Nights / 10 Days Switzerland package (CH-005 / TRG-SWI-GRD-2026): Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Jungfraujoch • Zermatt • Montreux • Geneva.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN ZURICH
days.description: Arrive in Zurich. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: ZURICH CULTURAL DISCOVERY
days.description: Comprehensive city tour covering Zurich’s most famous landmarks, providing a rich educational experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO LUCERNE
days.description: Scenic transfer to Lucerne. Visit the iconic Chapel Bridge and take a peaceful lake cruise, a classic Swiss experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MT. TITLIS EXCURSION
days.description: Ascend to Mt. Titlis by cable car. Enjoy snow activities at the summit, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO INTERLAKEN
days.description: Scenic train transfer to Interlaken. Check into your luxury alpine retreat.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: JUNGFRAUJOCH EXPEDITION
days.description: A spectacular journey to Jungfraujoch—the Top of Europe. Experience breathtaking panoramic views and high-altitude excitement.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO ZERMATT
days.description: Transfer to Zermatt. Check into an ultra-luxury boutique suite with Matterhorn views.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MATTERHORN EXPLORATION
days.description: Explore Zermatt at your own pace, enjoy boutique shopping, and an exclusive experience viewing the iconic peak.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: TRANSFER TO GENEVA
days.description: Scenic transfer to Geneva. Evening farewell dinner gala, celebrating your grand Switzerland expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your grand Switzerland journey.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

inclusions.text: 09 Nights in handpicked premium hotels across Zurich • Lucerne • Mt. Titlis • Interlaken • Jungfraujoch • Zermatt • Montreux • Geneva
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Mt. Titlis cable car ascent with summit snow activities
Lucerne lake cruise and Chapel Bridge sightseeing
Matterhorn-view luxury stay and exploration in Zermatt
Geneva lakeside elegance and farewell gala dinner
International airfare and Switzerland entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
